description_long: This object is a round, bun-like form with a golden-brown, sesame-seeded top and a slightly darker, textured lower half. The surface is dotted with white sesame seeds, and the sides reveal a layered structure with a dark central band resembling a patty, flanked by lighter, bread-like layers. There are irregular, pale strips and a yellowish section visible at the edges, suggesting the presence of additional fillings. The overall appearance is that of a sandwich or burger, with a soft, slightly glossy exterior and a dense, layered interior. The object is compact and appears to be made of soft, edible materials.
description: A round, golden-brown object with a sesame-seeded top and layered, sandwich-like sides. It features a dark central band and pale, irregular strips at the edges.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing a round, golden-brown surface covered in white sesame seeds.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered structure with a dark central band and lighter, bread-like layers.
description_view_2: Bottom or rear view with a mostly smooth, brown surface and some geometric distortion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark central band and pale, irregular strips protruding from the layers.
attribute_blemish_pattern: irregular pale strips and some surface discoloration
